_note: Group stage scenarios — 'who needs what result'. Update each scenario's status and outcome as matches are played.

A.summary: Mexico are favorites but face South Africa in the opener. This group will be defined by matchday 1.

scenarios.outcome: Mexico control their destiny. Group A is theirs to lose.

scenarios.condition: South Africa draw or win vs Mexico (MD1)
scenarios.outcome: Group A becomes a genuine four-team battle. Mexico are in danger.

scenarios.condition: Mexico win all three group games
scenarios.outcome: Group A winners. Into Round of 32 with momentum.
Mexico are eliminated. Biggest upset of the co-host story.

B.summary: USA as co-host are expected to top Group B. Uruguay are the dangerous second seed.

scenarios.outcome: USA on track. Home crowd energy builds through the group stage.

scenarios.condition: USA draw or lose their opener
scenarios.outcome: Pressure on USMNT immediately. Group B suddenly wide open.
Biggest result of Group B. CONCACAF vs CONMEBOL pride match.
USMNT as group winners. Favorable Round of 32 draw possible.

C.summary: Canada at home vs Morocco and South Korea. Could be the most balanced group in the tournament.

scenarios.condition: Canada win their opener at BMO Field
scenarios.outcome: Canada seize control of Group C. Toronto erupts.
Confirms Morocco as genuine World Cup force, not just 2022 anomaly.

scenarios.condition: South Korea advance at Canada's expense
scenarios.outcome: Heartbreak for Canadian fans. Group C goes to Asia.

scenarios.condition: All four teams within one win of each other on MD3
scenarios.outcome: Group C final day — multiple scenarios in play simultaneously. Elite drama.

D.summary: Brazil are heavy favorites. But Group D has Chile and Hungary — neither is a pushover.

scenarios.condition: Brazil win all three group games
scenarios.outcome: Brazil dominant. Vinicius Jr in form. They look like champions.

scenarios.condition: Chile beat or draw with Brazil
scenarios.outcome: Massive CONMEBOL moment. Group D becomes a real contest.

scenarios.condition: Brazil drop points in two matches
scenarios.outcome: Alarm bells for Brazil. Exit pressure begins immediately.
Europe's surprise package emerges. Group D upset confirmed.

E.summary: Argentina defending champions. Paraguay, Turkey, and Indonesia all face a monumental task.

scenarios.outcome: Champions cruise. Messi saving energy for knockouts. Story continues.

scenarios.condition: Turkey hold Argentina to a draw
scenarios.outcome: Group E comes alive. Turkey show they belong. Argentina sweating.

scenarios.condition: Argentina drop out of Group E
scenarios.outcome: Defending champions eliminated in group stage. Devastating. Messi's final chapter ends badly.
World Cup debut success for Indonesia. Giant-killing spirit alive.

F.summary: France are clear favorites. Serbia and Iran are competitive. Jamaica are the dark horse.

scenarios.outcome: Expected. But how they play matters — are they in form?
One of the biggest shocks of the tournament. Serbia's physical style vs France's finesse.
Historic first knockout stage appearance for Jamaica. CONCACAF party.
Shocking result. Iran as group winners would be a landmark moment.

G.summary: Spain as favorites, Peru returning to the World Cup, Scotland's long-awaited debut, Senegal.

scenarios.outcome: Expected. Spain controlling tempo, looking like potential champions.
Historic. Scotland's first World Cup advancement in decades. Entire nation goes wild.
Africa's best team announces themselves. Senegal as dark horse confirmed.
Massive South American shock. Spain's title hopes take a serious blow.

H.summary: England are favorites but Group H has Venezuela and Poland — England can't coast.

scenarios.outcome: England in control. It's coming home conversations begin carefully.
Lewandowski sends England home. Another tournament heartbreak.
South American dark horse confirms their growth. CONMEBOL quality depth.

scenarios.condition: England fail to win a match
scenarios.outcome: Complete disaster. England's golden generation exits without a win.

I.summary: Portugal and Ronaldo's potential final chapter. Bolivia, Romania, Nigeria round out a fascinating group.

scenarios.outcome: Portugal in control. Cristiano Ronaldo's final World Cup heading in the right direction.
African football at its best. Nigeria reclaim their status as continental leaders.
Portugal shocked. Ronaldo's final tournament ends at the group stage.
High altitude specialists at sea level — any result is a triumph for Bolivia.

J.summary: Germany returning to form after 2022 disaster. Honduras, Austria, Cameroon in the mix.

scenarios.outcome: Germany back. Die Mannschaft look like themselves again.

scenarios.condition: Germany exit in group stage again
scenarios.outcome: Second consecutive group stage elimination. German football crisis deepens.
Indomitable Lions roar. African football keeps delivering.
CONCACAF depth demonstrated. Honduras shock a European power.

K.summary: Netherlands are favorites. Panama, Ukraine, South Africa (if applicable) make this competitive.

scenarios.outcome: Oranje on track. Netherlands looking for a first World Cup title.
CONCACAF's deepest run from a Central American nation.
Tournament football still bringing joy to a nation at war. Emotional storyline of the tournament.
Major shock. Group K title goes to a smaller nation.

L.summary: Croatia and Saudi Arabia headline Group L. Jordan and New Zealand are the potential giant-killers.

scenarios.outcome: Croatia's experienced squad justifies selection. Modric leads another deep run.
Arab nation reaches the knockout stage. Massive moment for football in the Middle East.
OFC's finest hour. New Zealand shock Europe's 2022 runners-up.
Saudi Arabia build on 2022 Argentina shock. Asian football's power continues to grow.
